source_title: Sudan Cholera End + UNHCR Two-Year Impact Update 2025
notes: Outbreak spread to all 18 states. 26M people in acute need; 13M displaced (largest displacement crisis globally). Famine confirmed Aug 2024.

source_title: DRC WHO Health Emergency Appeal 2026 + OCHA HRP 2025
notes: 21.2M Congolese affected by conflict, disasters, epidemics. 8.2M displaced (Sep 2025), projected 9M by 2026. 5 simultaneous disease outbreaks. OCHA HRP seeks $2.54B.

source_title: South Sudan HNRP 2026 + UNHCR South Sudan Factsheet 2025
notes: Record cholera + hepatitis E + mpox simultaneous. 9.4M people in need. 1.9M IDPs inside country, 2.3M refugees abroad. Hosting 500K+ Sudanese refugees.

primary_crisis: War, famine, and infectious disease risk
source_title: WHO Public Health Situation Analysis - oPt (September 2025)
notes: 63k+ deaths, 161k+ injuries. 2.1M people in need, 1.4M requiring emergency shelter. Medical infrastructure near collapse. Famine conditions confirmed.

source_title: PAHO Cholera Flare-up + OHCHR Haiti Violence Update (2025)
notes: 4,864 gang violence deaths (Oct2024-Jun2025) + 17 cholera deaths (Petion-Ville resurgence). 4.2M people in need. 1,041,229 displaced. Gang control ~85% of Port-au-Prince.
